opportunity.title: Show HN: Soros – AI for geopolitical macro investing
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Routing LLMs for geopolitical analysis introduces unique calibration challenges—the inherent biases in training data are amplified when applied to sensitive, rapidly evolving domains. Consider the impact of subtly different prompt engineering on sentiment analysis across news sources; a small shift can swing macro predictions dramatically. A robust system needs continuous, automated adversarial testing to identify and mitigate these drifts.
actions.reasoning: My experience building AI agents for complex decision-making, particularly around routing and orchestration, directly relates to the challenges presented in this project.
